title: Director of Intelligence (disambiguation)
content:
'''Director of Intelligence''' can refer to several different positions:

*[[Chief of Intelligence/Legends|Chief of Intelligence]]
*[[Director of Galactic Alliance Intelligence]]
*[[Director of Imperial Intelligence]]
*[[Director of New Republic Intelligence]]
*[[Director of Republic Intelligence]]
*[[Director of the Senate Bureau of Intelligence]]
